semantic_description: Read-only array scan that checks whether every adjacent pair is nondecreasing. The loop inspects a[i] and a[i + 1] from left to right and returns 0 immediately when it finds a descending adjacent pair; otherwise it exits the loop and returns 1. For n equal to 0 or 1 the loop body is skipped and the universal sortedness condition is vacuous. The function preserves the input array memory unchanged.
